title: Operation Highjump
author: UFO folklore
content: The theory claims Admiral Byrd’s 1946 Antarctic expedition was actually an attack on an underground Nazi base.
action: Massive military deployments to remote areas invite speculation about hidden objectives.

title: The Mandela Effect
author: Fiona Broome
content: The theory suggests that collective false memories are evidence of parallel universes or timeline shifts.
action: Shared memory errors challenge our belief in an objective, stable reality.

title: The Area 51 Reverse-Engineering
author: Bob Lazar
content: The theory posits that the government uses a secret base to study and reproduce extraterrestrial propulsion technology.
action: Extreme compartmentalization naturally fuels rumors of advanced, hidden technology.

title: The Global Seed Vault
author: Online skepticism
content: The theory claims the Svalbard vault is a tool for elite control over the world's food supply rather than conservation.
action: Control of essential resources is a primary fear of centralized governance.

title: The Hollow Moon Theory
author: Various proponents
content: The theory suggests the Moon is an artificial construction, possibly an observation base, due to its unusual orbit.
action: Anomalies in natural laws lead to theories of artificial engineering.
